response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, and cloud platforms, directly aligning with the required stack and responsibilities. His work on AI-agent infrastructure, internal tooling, and open-source platforms demonstrates strong architecture and user-centric delivery skills. His extensive testing, CI/CD, and cross-language proficiency (including Java/Kotlin) further strengthen his fit.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud-native tooling (Docker, AWS CDK)
Proven track record in AI-agent development and internal automation tooling (MCP generators, GISCollective)
Strong testing culture (Vitest/Jest equivalents), CI/CD, and open-source contributions demonstrating craftsmanship
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though Node.js/TypeScript testing experience is robust
German language skill is only basic, may pose minor communication challenges in Berlin-based team
Some roles lack clear metrics or scale indicators (e.g., 'millions of mails' is cited but not system throughput)
